name: nyxt
description: Sovereign browser agent. Keyboard-driven, Common Lisp REPL, fully scriptable. Bridge for J.A.R.V.I.S. recon targets and active Sanctuary agent slot.

tools.name: nyxt_status
tools.description: Show Nyxt config, AppImage path, REPL port, running state

tools.name: nyxt_setup
tools.description: Set AppImage path, verify Nyxt runs, write config

tools.name: nyxt_open
tools.description: Open a URL in Nyxt browser

tools.name: nyxt_recon
tools.description: Open a J.A.R.V.I.S. recon target in Nyxt

tools.name: nyxt_start
tools.description: Launch Nyxt and start Lisp REPL on configured port

tools.name: nyxt_eval
tools.description: Send a Lisp expression to the running Nyxt REPL

author: Victory — The Architect
